name: Jimmy Webb
abstract: Jimmy Layne Webb (born August 15, 1946) is an American songwriter, composer, and singer. He achieved success at an early age, winning the Grammy Award for Song of the Year at the age of 21.

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Allen
about_quotes.evidence: The first breakthrough composer after ’50 to suddenly be original and richly melodious and great, was Jimmy Webb, “By the Time I Get to Phoenix,” and a lot of other good songs about that time.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Allen interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
